creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: This one is older than bug 248967 and comment 3 here provides a partial fix. Once GL_COMMIT accepts non-full hash (abbreviated or refname) it'd be similar to GH_TAGNAME (in USE_GITHUB). Obviously, a proper fix would require a tree-wide cleanup (sweeping change) or a transitional period when GL_COMMIT is either missing or not equal to 40 hexadecimal digits.
